generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist swing motion data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital twin architecture described using C4 Model with context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Accurate system representation for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance CartMovementMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages cart movement along the gantry rail"
]

instance HoistingMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages hoisting operations"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles container pickup and release"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based interface for collecting data from physical crane controllers"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Records crane state data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboards for data monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Programming language for control logic and data processing (via gantrylib module)"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware interfacing for physical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling for system representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DevelopmentService
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Electronic circuit design"
]

instance MkDocs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Documentation generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DevelopmentService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control and collaboration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DevelopmentService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Recording operational metrics over time"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizing crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensuring alignment between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAlignmentInsight
]

instance DevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supports development and evolution of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DevelopmentInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Deployment of digital twin components in containers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control of physical actuators based on digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationAction
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recorded operational metrics for historical analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and analysis of crane operations"
]

instance OptimizedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized path for crane operations"
]

instance ModelAlignmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alignment between physical and digital models"
]

instance DevelopmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Development and evolution of the digital twin"
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of digital twin components"
]

instance ActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to move cart, hoist, or operate electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, a Python program, executes movement trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service through the Physical Crane Interface to control the Physical Crane. Command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams, implements containerization for deployment, and adopts an ad-hoc approach rather than a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against an acceptable threshold. Functionality validation was confirmed through empirical testing of control algorithms and sensor accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter-service communication within the digital twin system uses an MQTT Broker for signaling. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. The Python-based C4 Containers (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface) are bundled into a Python module named gantrylib."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standard is used for the digital twin in the Air Quality Management exemplar. No other industry standards or interoperability specifications are explicitly mentioned."
]
